Pinned browser assets used by the Smithers Markdown shell:

- marked 15.0.12, MIT License, https://github.com/markedjs/marked
- mermaid 11.14.0, MIT License, https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid
- highlight.js 11.11.1, BSD-3-Clause License, https://github.com/highlightjs/highlight.js

Downloaded from jsDelivr for local app bundling.
